message:
Add full skill lifecycle E2E tests

Implements comprehensive E2E tests for the CLI skill lifecycle covering:
- Install skill (jfp install <id> --json)
- List installed skills (jfp installed --json)
- Update skills with dry-run (jfp update --personal --dry-run --json)
- Uninstall skill (jfp uninstall <id> --confirm --json)
- Verify skill is removed after uninstall
- Force reinstall (jfp install <id> --force --json)
- Handle non-existent skill gracefully

Also closes several beads for tests that were already implemented:
- xbry (Cmd+K spotlight) - covered by spotlight.spec.ts
- lfzf (keyboard navigation) - covered by spotlight.spec.ts
- y6dx (clipboard verification) - covered by search-copy.spec.ts
- w6c9 (JSON schema stability) - covered by cli-workflow.test.ts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
